test_cases.description: Feature documentary with complex mixed content

input.title: The Collector
input.content: Talking heads, archive footage from film institute, advertising film clips on screen, original commissioned score, pop song on radio, archive photographs, historic building exterior, branded products visible

test_cases.notes: All relevant clearance categories identified. High-risk items (advertising clips, pop song) correctly flagged. Sync vs master licence distinction made explicit. Legal referral items listed separately.

input.title: Cold Front
input.content: Original interview recordings, archive radio broadcast clips (1980s), government document reading aloud, ambient location sound, original theme music commissioned, episode published to Spotify/Apple Podcasts

test_cases.notes: Podcast-specific clearance requirements handled. Archive radio broadcast clearance correctly differentiated from archive film. Government documents correctly identified as typically public domain with caveat.

test_cases.description: Short drama with location filming and practical sets

input.title: Margins
input.content: Professional actors (one known from TV), private residential location (owner permission verbal), café exterior filming (public street), contemporary art prints visible on walls (bought at market), licensed music track from a production library
input.distribution: Festival circuit, then short film streaming platforms

test_cases.notes: Drama format clears requirements differ from documentary — actor contracts vs release forms distinction made. Art prints on walls flagged for copyright check. Production library music correctly noted as pre-cleared but scope confirmation needed.
